metadata.description: Claude Code plugin for the Ink blockchain (chain 57073) ecosystem — Sentry token launches, Tsunami V3 DEX, concentrated liquidity, ERC-8004 agent identity, x402 stablecoin payments, .ink domains, DailyGM, analytics, and Relay cross-chain bridging, all via the inkonchain-mcp server.

plugins.name: ink
plugins.description: Operate on Ink: launch tokens (Sentry), trade on Tsunami V3, provide liquidity, register an ERC-8004 identity, pay/charge with x402, manage .ink domains, keep GM streaks, read analytics, and bridge cross-chain with Relay. Bundles a skill-router agent, slash commands, 14 playbook skills, and the inkonchain MCP server.
